mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.ks_indate DESC) AS rn FROM ( SELECT b.bu_name, a.ks_name, a.ks_id, a.ks_sabun, a.ks_indate, a.ks_wmsloginyn, a.ks_factory_access, a.ks_factory FROM t_wms_user a LEFT OUTER JOIN c_busor b ON a.ks_busor = b.bu_code WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY a.ks_busor, a.ks_name ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_user a LEFT OUTER JOIN c_busor b ON a.ks_busor = b.bu_code WHERE 1=1

select ts.subname as car, wi.itemcode, mi.itemname, sum(wi.qty) as qty from t_wms_inbound wi left join t_mi_item mi on wi.itemcode = mi.itemcode left join t_mi_typesub ts on mi.carno = ts.subcode and ts.typecode = 'MI041' group by ts.subname, wi.itemcode, mi.itemname order by wi.itemcode

SELECT a.iid, a.indate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.barcode, a.roomcode, a.wccode, a.ymdhms, a.intf_yn, a.wms_key FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' ORDER BY iid desc, intf_yn

SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.source, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.type, a.barcode, a.location, a.lotdate, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, b.spec, a.lotdate as bdate FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn_barcode FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y'
and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) t WHERE rn_barcode = 1
) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC, a.itemcode

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sdate desc, itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.factory,
a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, b.spec
FROM (select * from ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y'
and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage}

SELECT a.factory,
a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, b.spec
FROM (select * from ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y'
and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec ORDER BY a.sdate desc, a.itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT a.factory,
a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y'
and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn_barcode FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) t WHERE rn_barcode = 1
) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LASTDAY'

SELECT NVL(SUM(A.QTY), 0) AS QTY FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn_barcode FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) t WHERE rn_barcode = 1 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LASTDAY'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sdate desc, itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, b.spec FROM ( select * from ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LASTDAY'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage}

SELECT a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, b.spec FROM (select * from ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LASTDAY'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec ORDER BY a.sdate desc, a.itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT a.factory, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LASTDAY'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec )

SELECT SUM(a.qty) AS total_qty FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LASTDAY'

SELECT e.subname_ch AS itemtype, b.subname AS car, a.itemcode, a.itemname, c.subname AS spec, a.oitemcode, a.oitemname, a.spec AS spec2, d.subname AS labelcolor FROM t_mi_item a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub b ON a.carno = b.subcode AND b.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON a.specno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI042' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub d ON a.LABEL_COLOR = d.subcode AND d.typecode = 'MI046' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub e ON a.cmb_itemtype = e.subcode AND e.typecode = 'MI002' WHERE a.deldate = ' ' ORDER BY e.subname, b.subname, c.subname, a.itemcode, a.itemname
SELECT cu_code, cu_sangho, cu_master, cu_adcode, cu_juso, cu_t_ddd, chk_buy, chk_sale, cu_bigo, cu_abbr FROM c_cust ORDER BY cu_sangho

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.QTY) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT PBARCODE, sdate , loginid, itemcode, sum(qty) as qty, custcode, custname, print_yn as printyn, COUNT(PBARCODE) as boxcount FROM t_scm_pallet where USEYN = 'Y'
GROUP BY PBARCODE, sdate, loginid, custcode, custname,print_yn, itemcode ) X order by X.SDATE DESC, X.PBARCODE desc
mapper.update:
update t_scm_pallet set print_yn = 'Y' where pbarcode in
#{pbarcode}
mapper.select: select cucode, cname, sum(to_number(qty)) as qty, itemcode, mdate, ( select bdate from t_scm_pallet where pbarcode = #{barcode} order by bdate fetch first 1 rows only ) as lotdate from t_scm_pallet where pbarcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y' group by cucode, cname, itemcode, pbarcode,mdate

SELECT aa.outdate, aa.custcode, cc.cu_sangho, bb.cno, bb.cname, e.subname_ch AS itemtype, b.subname AS car, a.itemcode, a.itemname, c.subname AS spec, aa.qty, aa.barcode, i.invoice_no, i.blcode, i.container_no, aa.intf_yn FROM t_wms_outbound aa LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mex_scm_out@ptlink o ON aa.barcode = o.barcode left outer join t_scm_barcode bb on aa.barcode = bb.barcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mex_scm_invoice@ptlink i ON o.invoice_no = i.invoice_no LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item a ON aa.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub b ON a.carno = b.subcode AND b.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON a.specno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI042' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub d ON a.LABEL_COLOR = d.subcode AND d.typecode = 'MI046' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub e ON a.cmb_itemtype = e.subcode AND e.typecode = 'MI002' left outer join c_cust cc on aa.custcode = cc.cu_code
WHERE aa.useyn='Y' and a.deldate = ' ' and aa.outdate > '2025-08-10' ORDER BY aa.outdate, o.cucode, aa.itemcode

SELECT e.subname_ch AS itemtype, b.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, a.itemname, c.subname_ch AS spec, a.oitemcode, a.oitemname, a.spec AS spec2, d.subname AS labelcolor FROM t_mi_item a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub b ON a.carno = b.subcode AND b.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON a.specno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI042' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub d ON a.LABEL_COLOR = d.subcode AND d.typecode = 'MI046' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub e ON a.cmb_itemtype = e.subcode AND e.typecode = 'MI002' WHERE a.deldate = ' ' and e.subname is not null
AND upper(e.subname_ch) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchCriteria.itemtype}) || '%'
AND upper(b.subname_ch) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchCriteria.car}) || '%'
AND upper(a.itemcode) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchCriteria.itemcode}) || '%'
AND upper(a.itemname) LIKE '%' ||upper(#{searchCriteria.itemname}) || '%'
AND upper(c.subname_ch) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchCriteria.spec}) || '%'
AND upper(a.oitemcode) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchCriteria.oitemcode}) || '%'
AND upper(a.oitemname) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchCriteria.oitemname}) || '%'
AND upper(a.spec) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchCriteria.spec2}) || '%'
AND upper(d.subname) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchCriteria.labelcolor}) || '%'
ORDER BY e.subname, b.subname, c.subname, a.itemcode, a.itemname
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rn, itemtype, car, itemcode, itemname, spec, oitemcode, oitemname, spec2, labelcolor FROM ( SELECT e.subname_ch AS itemtype, b.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, a.itemname, c.subname_ch AS spec, a.oitemcode, a.oitemname, a.spec AS spec2, d.subname AS labelcolor FROM t_mi_item a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub b ON a.carno = b.subcode AND b.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON a.specno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI042' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub d ON a.LABEL_COLOR = d.subcode AND d.typecode = 'MI046' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub e ON a.cmb_itemtype = e.subcode AND e.typecode = 'MI002' WHERE a.deldate = ' ' and e.subname is not null
AND e.subname_ch LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.itemType} || '%'
AND b.subname_ch LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.car} || '%'
AND a.itemcode LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.itemCode} || '%'
AND a.itemname LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.itemName} || '%'
AND c.subname_ch LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.spec} || '%'
AND a.oitemcode LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.oitemCode} || '%'
AND a.oitemname LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.oitemName} || '%'
AND a.spec LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.spec2} || '%'
AND d.subname LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.labelColor} || '%'
ORDER BY e.subname, b.subname, c.subname, a.itemcode, a.itemname ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn > #{startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_mi_item a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub b ON a.carno = b.subcode AND b.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON a.specno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI042' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub d ON a.LABEL_COLOR = d.subcode AND d.typecode = 'MI046' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub e ON a.cmb_itemtype = e.subcode AND e.typecode = 'MI002' WHERE a.deldate = ' ' and e.subname is not null
AND e.subname_ch LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.itemtype} || '%'
AND b.subname_ch LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.car} || '%'
AND a.itemcode LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.itemcode} || '%'
AND a.itemname LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.itemname} || '%'
AND c.subname_ch LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.spec} || '%'
AND a.oitemcode LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.oitemcode} || '%'
AND a.oitemname LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.oitemname} || '%'
AND a.spec LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.spec2} || '%'
AND d.subname LIKE '%' || #{searchCriteria.labelcolor} || '%'

SELECT e.subname_ch AS itemtype, b.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, a.itemname, c.subname_ch AS spec, a.spec AS custcode FROM t_mi_item a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub b ON a.carno = b.subcode AND b.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON a.specno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI042' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub d ON a.LABEL_COLOR = d.subcode AND d.typecode = 'MI046' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub e ON a.cmb_itemtype = e.subcode AND e.typecode = 'MI002' WHERE a.deldate = ' ' and e.subname is not null
AND UPPER(TRIM(e.subname_ch)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{searchParams.itemtype})) || '%'
AND UPPER(TRIM(b.subname_ch)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{searchParams.car})) || '%'
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.itemcode)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{searchParams.itemcode})) || '%'
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.itemname)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{searchParams.itemname})) || '%'
AND UPPER(TRIM(c.subname_ch)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{searchParams.spec})) || '%'
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.spec)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{searchParams.cucode})) || '%'
ORDER BY a.itemcode
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_MI_ITEM
UNIT_WEIGHT = #{UNIT_WEIGHT},
PALLET_WEIGHT = #{PALLET_WEIGHT},
WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode}
mapper.select: SELECT IID, STORAGE, FACTORY, RACK FROM T_WMS_WAREHOUSE ORDER BY FACTORY, STORAGE, RACK

SELECT c.subname, b.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec, a.condate, d.itemcode AS itemcode_1, d.itemname AS itemname_1, d.spec AS spec_1, COALESCE(a.qtyper, 0) AS qtyper, COALESCE(a.orderidx, 0) AS orderidx FROM t_mi_mbomstr a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN t_mi_item d ON a.childcode = d.itemcode
ORDER BY a.orderidx, d.itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT c.subname, b.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec, a.condate FROM t_mi_mbomstr a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE b.itemcode is not null
AND UPPER(c.subname) LIKE UPPER(#{subnameLike})
AND (REPLACE(b.itemcode, ' ','') LIKE REPLACE(#{itemcodeLike}, ' ', '') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_mi_mbomstr bom_sub LEFT JOIN t_mi_item item_sub ON bom_sub.childcode = item_sub.itemcode WHERE bom_sub.itemcode = a.itemcode AND bom_sub.condate = a.condate AND REPLACE(item_sub.itemcode, ' ','') LIKE REPLACE(#{itemcodeLike}, ' ', '') ))
AND UPPER(REPLACE(b.itemname, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(REPLACE(#{itemnameLike}, ' ', '')) || '%'
AND UPPER(b.spec) LIKE UPPER(#{specLike})
AND a.condate LIKE #{condateLike}
)

SELECT subname, itemcode, itemname, spec, condate, itemcode_1, itemname_1, spec_1, qtyper, orderidx FROM ( SELECT parent_data.subname, parent_data.itemcode, parent_data.itemname, parent_data.spec, parent_data.condate, d.itemcode AS itemcode_1, d.itemname AS itemname_1, d.spec AS spec_1, NVL(a.qtyper, 0) AS qtyper, NVL(a.orderidx, 0) AS orderidx, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY parent_data.rn, NVL(a.orderidx, 0), d.itemcode ) AS final_rn FROM ( SELECT subname, itemcode, itemname, spec, condate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY subname, itemcode, condate) AS rn FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT c.subname, b.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec, a.condate FROM t_mi_mbomstr a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' and b.itemcode is not null
AND UPPER(c.subname) LIKE UPPER(#{subnameLike})
AND (REPLACE(b.itemcode, ' ','') LIKE REPLACE(#{itemcodeLike}, ' ', '') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_mi_mbomstr bom_sub LEFT JOIN t_mi_item item_sub ON bom_sub.childcode = item_sub.itemcode WHERE bom_sub.itemcode = a.itemcode AND bom_sub.condate = a.condate AND REPLACE(item_sub.itemcode, ' ','') LIKE REPLACE(#{itemcodeLike}, ' ', '') ))
AND UPPER(REPLACE(b.itemname, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(REPLACE(#{itemnameLike}, ' ', '')) || '%'
AND UPPER(b.spec) LIKE UPPER(#{specLike})
AND a.condate LIKE #{condateLike}
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} and itemcode is not null ) parent_data LEFT JOIN t_mi_mbomstr a ON ( parent_data.itemcode = a.itemcode AND parent_data.condate = a.condate ) LEFT JOIN t_mi_item d ON a.childcode = d.itemcode WHERE parent_data.rn > #{offset} and d.itemcode is not null ) ORDER BY subname, itemcode, final_rn
SELECT MONTH, SDATE, INUSER FROM T_WMS_CLOSE ORDER BY MONTH DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_WMS_CLOSE ( MONTH, SDATE, INUSER ) VALUES ( #{month}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{loginid} )
mapper.select: SELECT SDATE, FACTORY, STORAGE, LOGINID, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(YMDHMS, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS YMDHMS FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK_DATE ORDER BY IID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_WMS_REALSTOCK_DATE ( FACTORY, STORAGE, SDATE, LOGINID, YMDHMS ) VALUES ( #{factory}, #{storage}, #{sdate}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
mapper.select:
SELECT w.RACK AS RACKID, w.STORAGE, w.FACTORY AS AREA, COALESCE(stats.TOTALCAPACITY, 0) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COALESCE(stats.CURRENTCOUNT, 0) AS CURRENTCOUNT_old, COALESCE(stats.UTILIZATIONRATE, 0) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, COALESCE(stats.TOTALQTY, 0) AS TOTALQTY, stats.LASTUPDATED, COALESCE(stats.TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY, 0) AS TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY,
nvl(CURRENTCOUNT,0) as CURRENTCOUNT FROM ( SELECT factory, storage, rack FROM t_wms_warehouse WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(STORAGE) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(FACTORY) = #{factory}
AND (
UPPER(NVL(l.BARCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
UPPER(NVL(l.ITEMCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
(UPPER(NVL(l.LOCATION, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.BARCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.ITEMCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.MEMO, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.RACK, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%')
)
GROUP BY factory, storage, rack ) w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT l.RACK, l.STORAGE, l.FACTORY, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS CURRENTCOUNT_old, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0 ) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, SUM(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(NVL(l.QTY, '0')) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTALQTY, MAX(CASE WHEN l.YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.YMDHMS_D)) > 0 THEN l.YMDHMS_D ELSE l.YMDHMS END) AS LASTUPDATED, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_warehouse w2 WHERE upper(w2.FACTORY) = upper(l.FACTORY) AND upper(w2.STORAGE) = upper(l.STORAGE) AND w2.RACK = l.RACK) AS TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY, (select count(count(rack)) from t_wms_location b where l.rack = b.rack and useyn = 'Y' and l.storage = b.storage and b.factory = l.factory group by factory,storage,rack,module,levelcode,position) AS CURRENTCOUNT, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_warehouse w2 WHERE upper(w2.FACTORY) = upper(l.FACTORY) AND upper(w2.STORAGE) = upper(l.STORAGE) AND w2.RACK = l.RACK), 0 ) AS ACTUAL_UTILIZATIONRATE FROM t_wms_location l WHERE l.USEYN = 'Y'
GROUP BY l.RACK, l.STORAGE, l.FACTORY ) stats ON upper(w.FACTORY) = upper(stats.FACTORY) AND upper(w.STORAGE) = upper(stats.STORAGE) AND w.RACK = stats.RACK WHERE w.rack is not null ORDER BY upper(w.FACTORY), upper(w.STORAGE), TOTALCAPACITY DESC, w.RACK

SELECT w.RACK AS RACKID, 'RACK ' || w.RACK AS RACKNAME, w.STORAGE, w.FACTORY AS AREA, COALESCE(stats.TOTALCAPACITY, 0) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COALESCE(stats.CURRENTCOUNT, 0) AS CURRENTCOUNT_old, COALESCE(stats.UTILIZATIONRATE, 0) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, COALESCE(stats.TOTALQTY, 0) AS TOTALQTY, stats.LASTUPDATED, COALESCE(stats.TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY, 0) AS TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY,
nvl(CURRENTCOUNT,0) as CURRENTCOUNT FROM ( SELECT factory, storage, rack FROM t_wms_warehouse WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(STORAGE) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(FACTORY) = #{factory}
AND (
UPPER(NVL(l.BARCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
UPPER(NVL(l.ITEMCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
(UPPER(NVL(l.LOCATION, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.BARCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.ITEMCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.MEMO, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.RACK, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%')
)
GROUP BY factory, storage, rack ) w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT l.RACK, l.STORAGE, l.FACTORY, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS CURRENTCOUNT_old, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0 ) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, SUM(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(NVL(l.QTY, '0')) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTALQTY, MAX(CASE WHEN l.YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.YMDHMS_D)) > 0 THEN l.YMDHMS_D ELSE l.YMDHMS END) AS LASTUPDATED, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_warehouse w2 WHERE w2.FACTORY = l.FACTORY AND w2.STORAGE = l.STORAGE AND w2.RACK = l.RACK) AS TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY, (select count(count(rack)) from t_wms_worklocation b where l.rack = b.rack and useyn = 'Y' and l.storage = b.storage and b.factory = l.factory group by factory,storage,rack,module,levelcode,position) AS CURRENTCOUNT, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_warehouse w2 WHERE w2.FACTORY = l.FACTORY AND w2.STORAGE = l.STORAGE AND w2.RACK = l.RACK), 0 ) AS ACTUAL_UTILIZATIONRATE FROM t_wms_worklocation l WHERE l.USEYN = 'Y'
GROUP BY l.RACK, l.STORAGE, l.FACTORY ) stats ON w.FACTORY = stats.FACTORY AND w.STORAGE = stats.STORAGE AND w.RACK = stats.RACK WHERE w.rack is not null ORDER BY w.FACTORY, w.STORAGE, w.RACK

SELECT RACK AS RACKID, RACK AS RACKNAME, STORAGE, FACTORY AS AREA, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS CURRENTCOUNT, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0 ) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, SUM(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(NVL(QTY, '0')) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTALQTY, MAX(CASE WHEN YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(YMDHMS_D)) > 0 THEN YMDHMS_D ELSE YMDHMS END) AS LASTUPDATED, (select max(to_number(module)) as module from t_wms_warehouse b where upper(a.storage) = upper(b.storage) and upper(a.factory) = upper(b.factory) and a.rack = b.rack) as modules FROM t_wms_location a WHERE UPPER(RACK) = UPPER(#{rackId})
AND UPPER(STORAGE) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND upper(FACTORY) = #{factory}
GROUP BY RACK, STORAGE, FACTORY

SELECT RACK AS RACKID, 'RACK ' || RACK AS RACKNAME, STORAGE, FACTORY AS AREA, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS CURRENTCOUNT, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0 ) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, SUM(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(NVL(QTY, '0')) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTALQTY, MAX(CASE WHEN YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(YMDHMS_D)) > 0 THEN YMDHMS_D ELSE YMDHMS END) AS LASTUPDATED, (select max(to_number(module)) as module from t_wms_warehouse b where upper(a.storage) = upper(b.storage) and upper(a.factory) = upper(b.factory) and a.rack = b.rack) as modules FROM t_wms_worklocation a WHERE UPPER(RACK) = UPPER(#{rackId})
AND UPPER(STORAGE) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND upper(FACTORY) = #{factory}
GROUP BY RACK, STORAGE, FACTORY

SELECT IID, INDATE, USEYN, YMDHMS, YMDHMS_D, MEMO_D, LOCATION, BARCODE, ITEMCODE, QTY, MEMO, LOGINID,
-- 분리된 컬럼들 직접 사용 STORAGE, FACTORY AS AREA, RACK AS RACKID, MODULE AS MODULENUM, LEVELCODE AS LEVELNAME, POSITION AS POSITIONNUM,
CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 'occupied' ELSE 'empty' END AS POSITIONSTATUS,
-- 날짜 포맷팅 (오라클 방식) CASE WHEN YMDHMS IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(YMDHMS)) = 14 THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(YMDHMS, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE NULL END AS FORMATTEDYMDHMS, CASE WHEN YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(YMDHMS_D)) = 14 THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(YMDHMS_D, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE NULL END AS FORMATTEDYMDHMS_D, (select carno from t_mi_item t where t.itemcode = l.itemcode) as itemcode_mi, (select itemname from t_mi_item t where t.itemcode = l.itemcode) as itemname_mi,
(select sum(qty) from t_wms_worklocation k where l.location = k.location and useyn = 'Y') || ' (' || (select count(qty) from t_wms_worklocation k where l.location = k.location and useyn = 'Y') || ')' as carname, (select count(qty) from t_wms_worklocation k where l.location = k.location and useyn = 'Y') as cnt
FROM t_wms_worklocation l WHERE UPPER(RACK) = UPPER(#{rackId})
AND UPPER(STORAGE) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(FACTORY) = #{factory}
AND USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY MODULE, -- 모듈 순 (숫자 정렬) CASE LEVELCODE -- 레벨 순 (D>C>B>A) WHEN 'D' THEN 1 WHEN 'C' THEN 2 WHEN 'B' THEN 3 WHEN 'A' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, POSITION -- 포지션 순 (숫자 정렬)

SELECT -- 전체 RACK 수 COUNT(DISTINCT RACK) AS TOTALRACKS,
-- 전체 포지션 수 COUNT(*) AS TOTALPOSITIONS,
-- 점유된 포지션 수 COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS OCCUPIEDPOSITIONS,
-- 전체 적재율 ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0 ) AS OVERALLUTILIZATIONRATE,
-- 전체 수량 (VARCHAR2 → NUMBER 변환) SUM(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(NVL(QTY, '0')) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTALQTY,
-- 최종 업데이트 시간 MAX(CASE WHEN YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(YMDHMS_D)) > 0 THEN YMDHMS_D ELSE YMDHMS END) AS LASTUPDATED
FROM t_wms_location

select a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.sdate as locDate, NVL(c.sdate, '-') as sDate, substr(a.barcode,15,6) as LOT, --d.subname_ch as car, a.rack as car, a.barcode, B.SPEC AS OITEMCODE from t_wms_location a left outer join t_mi_item b on a.itemcode=b.itemcode
left outer join ( select barcode, sdate from ( select c.*, row_number() over(partition by barcode order by iid desc) rn from t_wms_inbound c where c.useyn = 'Y' ) where rn = 1 ) c on a.barcode = c.barcode left outer join t_mi_typesub d on b.carno = d.subcode and d.typecode = 'MI041' where upper(a.barcode) = upper(#{barcode}) and a.useyn = 'Y'

select a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.indate as locDate, NVL(c.indate, '-') as inDate, substr(a.barcode,15,6) as LOT, d.subname_ch as car, a.barcode from t_wms_worklocation a left outer join t_mi_item b on a.itemcode=b.itemcode left outer join ( select barcode, indate from ( select c.*, row_number() over(partition by barcode order by iid desc) rn from t_wms_workinbound c where c.useyn = 'Y' ) where rn = 1 ) c on a.barcode = c.barcode left outer join t_mi_typesub d on b.carno = d.subcode and d.typecode = 'MI041' where upper(a.location) = upper(#{location}) and a.useyn = 'Y'
select MAX(IFNO) from T_PM_ENTERSUB_IF where ifno like '%${formattedDate}%'
mapper.update:
update t_wms_inbound set intf_yn = 'Y', intf_ymdhms = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), ifno = #{ifno}, mes_key = #{meskey} where iid in
#{iid}
update t_wms_inbound set intf_yn = 'N', intf_ymdhms = '', ifno = '', mes_key = null where mes_key = #{meskey}
update t_wms_inbound set intf_yn = 'N', intf_ymdhms_D = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), intf_ymdhms =null, ifno = null, mes_key = null where iid = #{iid}
UPDATE T_WMS_WORKMOVE SET WMS_KEY = #{mes_key}, INTF_YN = 'Y' WHERE iid = #{iid}

UPDATE T_WMS_WORKMOVE SET wms_key= null, INTF_YN = 'N', INTF_YMDHMS_D = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE indate = #{indate} AND barcode = #{barcode} AND INTF_YN = 'Y' and source = 'WIPINPUT'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_MM_DELIVERYSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MDNO, MDSUBNO, CHILDCODE, MANCODE, ROOMCODE, WCCODE, OUTQTY, QTY, TREASON, TESTATE, REMARK, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, MONO, MOSUBNO, MOSUBNO2 ) SELECT LPAD(TO_NUMBER(#{ifno_if}) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ROWID) - 1, 12, '0') AS IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MDNO, MDSUBNO, CHILDCODE, MANCODE, ROOMCODE, WCCODE, OUTQTY, QTY, TREASON, TESTATE, REMARK, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, 'D' AS CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, MONO, MOSUBNO, MOSUBNO2 FROM T_MM_DELIVERYSUB_IF WHERE MES_KEY = #{mes_key}

INSERT INTO T_MM_DELIVERYSUB_REAL_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MDNO, MDSUBNO2, CHILDCODE, MANCODE, ROOMCODE, WCCODE, RQTY, QTY, TESTATE, REMARK, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ ) SELECT LPAD(TO_NUMBER(#{ifno_real_if}) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ROWID) - 1, 12, '0') AS IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MDNO, MDSUBNO2, CHILDCODE, MANCODE, ROOMCODE, WCCODE, RQTY, QTY, TESTATE, REMARK, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, 'D' AS CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ FROM T_MM_DELIVERYSUB_REAL_IF WHERE MES_KEY = #{mes_key}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_WMS_WORKMOVE SET WMS_KEY= null, INTF_YN = 'N' WHERE iid = #{iid}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(TO_CHAR(u.KS_ID), 'none') AS KS_ID , NVL(u.KS_NAME, 'none') AS KS_NAME , NVL(u.KS_DML_ACCESS, 'N') AS KS_DML_ACCESS , NVL(u.KS_FACTORY_ACCESS, 'ALL') AS KS_FACTORY_ACCESS FROM( SELECT KS_ID, KS_NAME, KS_DML_ACCESS, KS_FACTORY_ACCESS FROM T_WMS_USER WHERE UPPER(KS_ID) = UPPER(#{userId}) AND KS_PASSWD = #{userPw} AND KS_WMSLOGINYN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) u RIGHT JOIN DUAL ON 1 = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum rn, t.* FROM (
SELECT l.barcode, l.indate, l.factory, l.storage, c.subname_ch as car, l.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(l.qty) as qty, nvl(l.oldlocation,' ') as oldlocation, l.source FROM t_wms_location l LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON l.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE (l.rack IS NULL or l.rack = '-' OR l.module IS NULL or l.module = '-' OR l.levelcode IS NULL OR l.levelcode = '-' OR l.position IS NULL OR l.position = '-')
AND UPPER(l.factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(l.factory) = 'SALTILLO'
AND UPPER(l.storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(l.storage) = UPPER('Material')
AND l.useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY l.barcode, l.indate, l.factory, l.storage, c.subname_ch, l.itemcode, b.itemname, l.source, l.oldlocation ORDER BY l.indate desc, l.itemcode
) t WHERE rownum <= #{offset} + #{pageSize} ) WHERE rn > #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT l.barcode, l.indate, c.subname_ch as car, l.itemcode, b.itemname FROM t_wms_location l LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON l.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE (l.rack IS NULL or l.rack = '-' OR l.module IS NULL or l.module = '-' OR l.levelcode IS NULL OR l.levelcode = '-' OR l.position IS NULL OR l.position = '-')
AND UPPER(l.factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(l.factory) = 'SALTILLO'
AND UPPER(l.storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(l.storage) = UPPER('Material')
AND l.useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY l.barcode, l.indate, c.subname_ch, l.itemcode, b.itemname )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT X.*, NVL(COUNT(*) OVER(), 0) AS totalCount, NVL(SUM(NVL(X.QTY,0)) OVER(), 0) AS totalQty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY ) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.factory AS FACTORY, a.storage AS STORAGE, a.location AS LOCATION, a.sdate AS SDATE, c.subname_ch AS CAR, a.itemcode AS ITEMCODE, b.itemname AS ITEMNAME, b.spec AS SPEC, a.qty AS QTY, a.barcode AS BARCODE, a.ymdhms AS YMDHMS, a.loginid AS LOGINID, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) AS HHMM, COALESCE(d.madate, e.madate) AS madate FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT barcode, MAX(madate) AS madate FROM t_scm_barcode WHERE useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY barcode ) d ON d.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT P.PBARCODE, MIN(B.MADATE) AS MADATE FROM T_SCM_PALLET P JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE B ON P.BBARCODE = B.BARCODE AND B.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE P.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY p.pbarcode ) e ON e.pbarcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
) X ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY rn

SELECT X.*, NVL(COUNT(*) OVER(), 0) AS totalCount, NVL(SUM(NVL(X.QTY, 0)) OVER(), 0) AS totalQty FROM ( SELECT a.factory AS FACTORY, a.storage AS STORAGE, a.location AS LOCATION, a.sdate AS SDATE, c.subname_ch AS CAR, a.itemcode AS ITEMCODE, b.itemname AS ITEMNAME, a.qty AS QTY, a.barcode AS BARCODE, a.ymdhms AS YMDHMS, a.loginid AS LOGINID, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) AS HHMM, CASE WHEN INSTR(a.barcode, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a.barcode, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS BDATE, b.spec AS SPEC, COALESCE(d.madate, e.madate) AS madate FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT barcode, MAX(madate) AS madate FROM t_scm_barcode WHERE useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY barcode ) d ON d.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT P.PBARCODE, MIN(B.MADATE) AS MADATE FROM T_SCM_PALLET P JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE B ON P.BBARCODE = B.BARCODE AND B.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE P.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY p.pbarcode ) e ON e.pbarcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
) X ORDER BY

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT X.*, NVL(COUNT(*) OVER(), 0) AS totalCount, NVL(SUM(NVL(X.QTY,0)) OVER(), 0) AS totalQty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY ) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.factory AS FACTORY, a.storage AS STORAGE, a.location AS LOCATION, a.sdate AS SDATE, c.subname_ch AS CAR, a.itemcode AS ITEMCODE, b.itemname AS ITEMNAME, b.spec AS SPEC, a.qty AS QTY, a.barcode AS BARCODE, a.ymdhms AS YMDHMS, a.loginid AS LOGINID, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) AS HHMM, COALESCE(d.madate, e.mdate) AS madate FROM t_wms_locationbackup a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT barcode, MAX(madate) AS madate FROM t_scm_barcode WHERE useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY barcode ) d ON d.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT P.PBARCODE, MIN(B.MADATE) AS MDATE FROM T_SCM_PALLET P JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE B ON P.BBARCODE = B.BARCODE AND B.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE P.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY p.pbarcode ) e ON e.pbarcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' and a.backup_date like CONCAT( CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_wms_locationbackup WHERE useyn = 'Y' AND backup_date like CONCAT(#{backupdate},'%')) THEN #{backupdate} ELSE (SELECT SUBSTR(MAX(backup_date), 1, 10) FROM t_wms_locationbackup WHERE useyn = 'Y') END ,'%')
) X ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY rn

SELECT X.*, NVL(COUNT(*) OVER(), 0) AS totalCount, NVL(SUM(NVL(X.QTY, 0)) OVER(), 0) AS totalQty FROM ( SELECT a.factory AS FACTORY, a.storage AS STORAGE, a.location AS LOCATION, a.sdate AS SDATE, c.subname_ch AS CAR, a.itemcode AS ITEMCODE, b.itemname AS ITEMNAME, a.qty AS QTY, a.barcode AS BARCODE, a.ymdhms AS YMDHMS, a.loginid AS LOGINID, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) AS HHMM, CASE WHEN INSTR(a.barcode, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a.barcode, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS BDATE, b.spec AS SPEC, COALESCE(d.madate, e.mdate) AS madate FROM t_wms_locationbackup a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT barcode, MAX(madate) AS madate FROM t_scm_barcode WHERE useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY barcode ) d ON d.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT P.PBARCODE, MIN(B.MADATE) AS MDATE FROM T_SCM_PALLET P JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE B ON P.BBARCODE = B.BARCODE AND B.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE P.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY p.pbarcode ) e ON e.pbarcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' and a.backup_date like CONCAT( CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_wms_locationbackup WHERE useyn = 'Y' AND backup_date like CONCAT(#{backupdate},'%')) THEN #{backupdate} ELSE (SELECT SUBSTR(MAX(backup_date), 1, 10) FROM t_wms_locationbackup WHERE useyn = 'Y') END ,'%')
) X ORDER BY

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
) t

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY t.itemcode ) AS rn FROM ( WITH ever_send AS ( -- SENDING 이력 있는 바코드 SELECT DISTINCT barcode FROM t_wms_factorymove WHERE useyn='Y' AND source='SENDING' ), last_evt AS ( -- 바코드별 최종 날짜 SELECT barcode, MAX(sdate) AS last_sdate FROM t_wms_factorymove WHERE useyn='Y' GROUP BY barcode ), last_src AS ( -- 최종 이벤트의 source (동일일자 중복이면 필요 시 보완) SELECT f.barcode, MAX(CASE WHEN f.sdate = l.last_sdate THEN f.source END) AS last_source FROM t_wms_factorymove f JOIN last_evt l ON l.barcode = f.barcode WHERE f.useyn='Y' GROUP BY f.barcode ) SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'SENDING' THEN sdate END) AS FROMDATE, MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'RECEIVING' THEN sdate END) AS TODATE, c.SUBNAME_CH as car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.barcode, SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'SENDING' THEN qty END) AS FROMQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'RECEIVING'THEN qty END) AS TOQTY, MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'SENDING' THEN factory END) AS FROMFACTORY, MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'SENDING' THEN storage END) AS FROMSTORAGE, MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'RECEIVING' THEN factory END) AS TOFACTORY, MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'RECEIVING' THEN storage END) AS TOSTORAGE, /* RECEIVING 바코드가 SENDING에도 있었고, 최종 이벤트가 RECEIVING이면 O, 아니면 X */ CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN a.source='RECEIVING' THEN 1 END) = 0 THEN NULL WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN a.source='RECEIVING' AND es.barcode IS NOT NULL AND ls.last_source = 'RECEIVING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS COMPLETE FROM t_wms_factorymove a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ever_send es ON es.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN last_src ls ON ls.barcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.itemcode,B.ITEMNAME,C.SUBNAME_CH, a.barcode ) t ) ORDER BY rn

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM t_wms_factorymove a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.itemcode, b.itemname, c.subname_ch, a.barcode )

SELECT sum(a.qty) FROM ( SELECT a.qty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC) AS rn FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
) a ORDER BY rn

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_location a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory,
c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname )

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT, -- 화면에 보이는 라인 수 SUM(t.QTY) AS TOTAL_QTY, -- 합계 재고수량 SUM(t.QTY) - SUM(t.NOQTY1) + SUM(t.NOQTY2) + SUM(t.NOQTY3) + SUM(t.UNPACKQTY) AS ERPQTY, -- ERP재고 계산식 SUM(t.NOQTY1) AS INQTY, -- 입고합 SUM(t.NOQTY2) AS OUTQTY, -- 출고합 SUM(t.UNPACKQTY) AS UNPACKQTY -- 언팩합
FROM ( SELECT FACTORY, CAR, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME, SUM(QTY) AS QTY, MAX(in_if_x) AS NOQTY1, MAX(out_if_x) AS NOQTY2, MAX(out_if_WAIT) AS NOQTY3, MAX(unpack_qty) AS UNPACKQTY FROM ( SELECT factory, storage, car, itemcode, itemname, yyyymm, SUM(qty) AS qty, SUM(in_if_x) AS in_if_x, SUM(out_if_x) AS out_if_x, SUM(out_if_WAIT) AS out_if_WAIT, SUM(unpack_qty) AS unpack_qty FROM V_STOCKSUM WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY factory, storage, car, itemcode, itemname, yyyymm ) GROUP BY FACTORY, CAR, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME ) t
SELECT SUM(qty) FROM t_scm_pallet WHERE useyn = 'Y'

SELECT sum(qty) FROM ( SELECT l.barcode, l.indate, c.subname_ch as car, l.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(l.qty) as qty FROM t_wms_inbound l LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON l.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041'
GROUP BY l.barcode, l.indate, c.subname_ch, l.itemcode, b.itemname )

sql.where:
l.useyn = 'Y'
AND l.indate = #{indate}
AND l.custcode LIKE '%' || #{cucode} || '%'
AND l.custname LIKE '%' || #{cname} || '%'
AND type LIKE '%' || #{type} || '%'
AND c.subname_ch LIKE '%' || #{car} || '%'
AND l.itemcode LIKE '%' || #{itemCode} || '%'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(b.itemname, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(REPLACE(#{itemName}, ' ', '')) || '%'
AND b.spec LIKE '%' || #{spec} || '%'
AND qty = #{qty}

mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(a.qty) AS total_qty FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y'
and r.sdate = #{sdate} ) x WHERE rn = 1 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM t_wms_inbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ITEMCODE, CUSTCODE FROM ( SELECT ITEMCODE, CUSTCODE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ITEMCODE ORDER BY CASE WHEN CUSTCODE = '0001' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, CUSTCODE ) AS RN FROM T_MI_ITEM_CUSTINFO WHERE GMAIN = 1 ) X WHERE RN = 1 ) d ON a.itemcode = d.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN c_cust e ON d.custcode = e.cu_code WHERE
a.useyn='Y'
a.useyn='N'
and source in ('INCOMINGLOCAL','INCOMINGCKD')
)

SELECT NVL(sum(a.qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_inbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ITEMCODE, CUSTCODE FROM ( SELECT ITEMCODE, CUSTCODE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ITEMCODE ORDER BY CASE WHEN CUSTCODE = '0001' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, CUSTCODE ) AS RN FROM T_MI_ITEM_CUSTINFO WHERE GMAIN = 1 ) X WHERE RN = 1 ) d ON a.itemcode = d.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN c_cust e ON d.custcode = e.cu_code WHERE
a.useyn='Y'
a.useyn='N'
and source in ('INCOMINGLOCAL','INCOMINGCKD')

SELECT a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, nvl(a.custcode,(SELECT CUSTCODE FROM (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM t_mi_price_buycust WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1)) AS custcode, nvl(a.custname,(SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE CU_CODE = (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM t_mi_price_buycust WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1))) as cname, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, a.MES_KEY AS ifno, a.invoiceno, a.intf_yn AS intf_yn FROM t_wms_inbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' and a.source in ('INCOMINGCKD','INCOMINGLOCAL')
GROUP BY a.itemcode, a.factory, a.storage, a.custcode, a.indate, a.custname, c.subname_ch, b.itemname, b.spec, a.invoiceno, a.intf_yn, a.MES_KEY ORDER BY indate DESC, itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM t_wms_inbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT itemcode, custcode FROM ( SELECT itemcode, custcode, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY itemcode ORDER BY CASE WHEN custcode='0001' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, custcode) rn FROM T_MI_ITEM_CUSTINFO WHERE gmain = 1 ) WHERE rn = 1 ) d ON a.itemcode = d.itemcode LEFT JOIN c_cust e ON d.custcode = e.cu_code WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' and a.source in ('INCOMINGCKD','INCOMINGLOCAL')
GROUP BY a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, d.custcode, e.cu_sangho, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec, a.intf_yn, a.MES_KEY,a.invoiceno )

SELECT NVL(sum(a.qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_inbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ITEMCODE, CUSTCODE FROM ( SELECT ITEMCODE, CUSTCODE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ITEMCODE ORDER BY CASE WHEN CUSTCODE = '0001' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, CUSTCODE ) AS RN FROM T_MI_ITEM_CUSTINFO WHERE GMAIN = 1 ) X WHERE RN = 1 ) d ON a.itemcode = d.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN c_cust e ON d.custcode = e.cu_code WHERE a.useyn='Y' and source in ('INCOMINGLOCAL','INCOMINGCKD')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, sub.* FROM ( SELECT a.iid, a.indate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.barcode, a.roomcode, a.wccode, a.ymdhms, a.intf_yn, a., SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' and a.source = 'WIPINPUT'
ORDER BY iid desc, intf_yn ) sub WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ) WHERE rn > #{offset} ORDER BY indate desc, ymdhms desc, barcode

SELECT a.iid, a.indate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.barcode, CASE WHEN INSTR(a.barcode, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a.barcode, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS bdate, a.roomcode, a.wccode, a.ymdhms, a.intf_yn, a., SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' and a.source = 'WIPINPUT'
ORDER BY a.indate desc, a.ymdhms desc, a.barcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' and a.source = 'WIPINPUT'

SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' and a.source = 'WIPINPUT'

SELECT a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, a.intf_yn, a.wccode FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' and source = 'WIPINPUT'
GROUP BY a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.intf_yn, a.wccode ORDER BY indate DESC, itemcode, a.intf_yn

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND SOURCE = 'WIPINPUT'
GROUP BY a.indate, a.factory, storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.intf_yn )

SELECT sum(qty) FROM ( SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND SOURCE = 'WIPINPUT'
)
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO t_wms_realstocknotscan (sdate, factory, storage, barcode, itemcode, qty, loginid, ymdhms) VALUES (#{vo.date}, #{vo.factory}, #{vo.storage}, #{vo.barcode}, #{vo.itemcode}, #{vo.qty}, #{vo.loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: select cu_code||'_'||cu_sangho from c_cust where chk_buy =1 and substr(cu_code,1,1) <> 'K' order by cu_sangho
select cu_code || '_' || cu_sangho as cust from c_cust where chk_sale=1 order by cu_sangho
SELECT count(*) FROM T_ST_Lock WHERE BRANCH = '000' AND STDATE >= #{condate}
SELECT count(*) FROM T_PM_CLOSE WHERE BRANCH = '000' AND CONDATE >= #{condate}
SELECT count(*) FROM T_QC_BUYREQUESTSUB A INNER JOIN t_pm_confirmsub B ON A.PENO = B.PENO WHERE A.MES_KEY =#{meskey} AND A.PENO <> ' '
SELECT count(*) FROM T_QC_BuyRequestSub A INNER JOIN T_QC_BuyTestSub B ON A.BRNO = B.BRNO WHERE A.MES_KEY =#{meskey} AND A.BRNO <> ' '
SELECT count(*) FROM T_QC_BuyRequestSub WHERE MES_KEY = #{meskey} AND MES_SEQ = '1'
SELECT count(*) FROM T_PM_ENTERbackSUB A INNER JOIN T_QC_BuyTestSub B ON A.PRNO = B.BRNO WHERE A.PRNO <> ' ' AND A.MES_KEY =#{mes_key}
SELECT count(*) FROM T_PM_ENTERbackSUB WHERE MES_KEY = #{mes_key} AND MES_SEQ = '1'
SELECT count(*) FROM T_SM_CLOSE WHERE BRANCH = '000' AND CONDATE >= #{condate}
SELECT count(*) FROM T_SM_DELIVERYSUB A INNER JOIN T_SM_ConfirmSub B ON A.SRNO = B.SRNO WHERE A.MES_KEY =#{mes_key} AND A.SRNO <> ' '
SELECT count(*) FROM T_SM_DELIVERYSUB WHERE MES_KEY = #{mes_key} AND MES_SEQ = '1'
SELECT count(*) FROM T_SM_DELIVERYBACKSUB A INNER JOIN T_SM_ConfirmSub B ON A.SBNO = B.SBNO WHERE A.SBNO <> ' ' AND A.MES_KEY =#{mes_key}
SELECT count(*) FROM T_SM_DELIVERYBACKSUB WHERE MES_KEY = #{mes_key} AND MES_SEQ = '1'

WITH BASE AS ( SELECT * FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND@mexlink WHERE CUSTNAME = 'WBTA' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND INVOICENO IS NOT NULL AND SOURCE = 'LOAD' ) , MAIN AS ( SELECT OUTDATE, CUSTNAME, INVOICENO, CONTAINER, SECURITY, BOX1, BOX2, BOX3, CARRIER, DATENO, FOWARDING, COMPLETE_YN, SUM(QTY) AS QTY, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM BASE GROUP BY OUTDATE, CUSTNAME, INVOICENO, CONTAINER, SECURITY, BOX1, BOX2, BOX3, CARRIER, DATENO, FOWARDING, COMPLETE_YN ) SELECT COMPLETE_YN, OUTDATE, CUSTNAME, INVOICENO, CONTAINER, SECURITY, BOX1, BOX2, BOX3, CARRIER, DATENO, FOWARDING, QTY, COUNT, SUM(QTY) OVER () TOTALQTY, COUNT(*) OVER() TOTALCOUNT FROM MAIN WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY OUTDATE DESC, INVOICENO DESC

WITH BASE AS ( SELECT * FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND@mexlink WHERE CUSTNAME = 'WBTA' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND INVOICENO IS NOT NULL AND SOURCE = 'LOAD' ) , MAIN AS ( SELECT A.OUTDATE, A.CUSTNAME, A.INVOICENO, A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC, B.ITEMNAME, A.CONTAINER, A.SECURITY, A.BOX1, A.BOX2, A.BOX3, A.CARRIER, A.DATENO, A.FOWARDING, A.COMPLETE_YN, A.BARCODE, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY FROM BASE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM@mexlink B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE AND B.DELDATE = ' ' LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB@mexlink C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' GROUP BY A.OUTDATE, A.CUSTNAME, A.INVOICENO, A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC, B.ITEMNAME, A.CONTAINER, A.SECURITY, A.BOX1, A.BOX2, A.BOX3, A.CARRIER, A.DATENO, A.FOWARDING, A.COMPLETE_YN, A.BARCODE ) SELECT OUTDATE, CUSTNAME, INVOICENO, ITEMCODE, SPEC AS OITEMCODE, ITEMNAME, CONTAINER, SECURITY, BOX1, BOX2, BOX3, CARRIER, DATENO, FOWARDING, QTY, BARCODE, SUM(QTY) OVER () TOTALQTY, COUNT(*) OVER() TOTALCOUNT FROM MAIN WHERE 1 = 1 AND COMPLETE_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY OUTDATE DESC, INVOICENO DESC, ITEMCODE, BARCODE

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.itemcode) AS rn,
/* 전체 개수 */ (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT inner_t.barcode) FROM ( WITH ever_send AS ( SELECT DISTINCT barcode FROM t_wms_factorymove WHERE useyn='Y' AND source='SENDING' ), last_evt AS ( SELECT barcode, MAX(sdate) AS last_sdate FROM t_wms_factorymove WHERE useyn='Y' GROUP BY barcode ), last_src AS ( SELECT f.barcode, MAX(CASE WHEN f.sdate = l.last_sdate THEN f.source END) AS last_source FROM t_wms_factorymove f JOIN last_evt l ON l.barcode = f.barcode WHERE f.useyn='Y' GROUP BY f.barcode ) SELECT a.barcode FROM t_wms_factorymove a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ever_send es ON es.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN last_src ls ON ls.barcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.itemcode, b.itemname, c.subname_ch, a.barcode ) inner_t ) AS TOTALCOUNT,
/* 총 수량 */ (SELECT NVL(SUM(inner_t.total_qty), 0) FROM ( WITH ever_send AS ( SELECT DISTINCT barcode FROM t_wms_factorymove WHERE useyn='Y' AND source='SENDING' ), last_evt AS ( SELECT barcode, MAX(sdate) AS last_sdate FROM t_wms_factorymove WHERE useyn='Y' GROUP BY barcode ), last_src AS ( SELECT f.barcode, MAX(CASE WHEN f.sdate = l.last_sdate THEN f.source END) AS last_source FROM t_wms_factorymove f JOIN last_evt l ON l.barcode = f.barcode WHERE f.useyn='Y' GROUP BY f.barcode ) SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'SENDING' THEN qty END) + SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'RECEIVING' THEN qty END) AS total_qty FROM t_wms_factorymove a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ever_send es ON es.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN last_src ls ON ls.barcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.itemcode, b.itemname, c.subname_ch, a.barcode ) inner_t ) AS TOTALQTY
FROM ( WITH ever_send AS ( SELECT DISTINCT barcode FROM t_wms_factorymove WHERE useyn='Y' AND source='SENDING' ), last_evt AS ( SELECT barcode, MAX(sdate) AS last_sdate FROM t_wms_factorymove WHERE useyn='Y' GROUP BY barcode ), last_src AS ( SELECT f.barcode, MAX(CASE WHEN f.sdate = l.last_sdate THEN f.source END) AS last_source FROM t_wms_factorymove f JOIN last_evt l ON l.barcode = f.barcode WHERE f.useyn='Y' GROUP BY f.barcode ) SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'SENDING' THEN sdate END) AS FROMDATE, MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'RECEIVING' THEN sdate END) AS TODATE, c.SUBNAME_CH as car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.barcode, SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'SENDING' THEN qty END) AS FROMQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'RECEIVING' THEN qty END) AS TOQTY, MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'SENDING' THEN factory END) AS FROMFACTORY, MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'SENDING' THEN storage END) AS FROMSTORAGE, MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'RECEIVING' THEN factory END) AS TOFACTORY, MAX(CASE WHEN source = 'RECEIVING' THEN storage END) AS TOSTORAGE, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN a.source='RECEIVING' THEN 1 END) = 0 THEN NULL WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN a.source='RECEIVING' AND es.barcode IS NOT NULL AND ls.last_source = 'RECEIVING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS COMPLETE FROM t_wms_factorymove a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ever_send es ON es.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN last_src ls ON ls.barcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.itemcode, b.itemname, c.subname_ch, a.barcode ) t ) where complete = 'O'
and rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{limit}
AND fromdate IS NULL
AND fromdate IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY rn

WITH base_sending AS ( SELECT a.indate AS indate , a.factory AS factory , a.storage AS storage , a.wccode AS wccode , a.barcode AS barcode , a.itemcode AS itemcode , a.loginid AS loginid , TO_NUMBER(a.qty) AS qty FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE a WHERE a.source = 'WIPSENDING' AND a.useyn = 'Y'
), scan1 AS ( /* 같은 바코드 기준 WIPINPUT 전체 스캔 수량 */ SELECT aa.indate AS indate , aa.barcode AS barcode , SUM(TO_NUMBER(aa.qty)) AS scanqty FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE aa WHERE aa.source = 'WIPINPUT' AND aa.useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY aa.indate, aa.barcode ), scan2 AS ( /* 팔레트 구성(PBARCODE 기준) WIPINPUT 수량 */ SELECT aa.indate AS indate , p.pbarcode AS barcode , SUM(TO_NUMBER(aa.qty)) AS scanqty2 FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE aa JOIN T_SCM_PALLET p ON aa.barcode = p.bbarcode WHERE aa.source = 'WIPINPUT' AND aa.useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY aa.indate, p.pbarcode ) SELECT bs.indate AS sentdate , bs.factory AS sentfactory , bs.storage AS sentstorage , bs.wccode AS wccode , bs.itemcode AS itemcode , b.itemname AS itemname , bs.loginid AS loginid , c.subname_ch AS car , SUM(bs.qty) AS qty -- sum(qty) , SUM(NVL(s1.scanqty , 0)) AS scanqty -- sum(scanqty) , SUM(NVL(s2.scanqty2, 0)) AS scanqty2 -- sum(scanqty2) FROM base_sending bs LEFT JOIN scan1 s1 ON s1.indate = bs.indate AND s1.barcode = bs.barcode LEFT JOIN scan2 s2 ON s2.indate = bs.indate AND s2.barcode = bs.barcode LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM b ON b.itemcode = bs.itemcode LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' GROUP BY bs.indate , bs.factory , bs.storage , bs.wccode , bs.itemcode , b.itemname , bs.loginid , c.subname_ch ORDER BY sentdate , sentfactory , sentstorage , wccode , itemcode

WITH base_data AS ( SELECT a.intf_yn, a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage, a.itemcode, a.oitemcode, b.itemname, a.invoiceno, a.mes_key, a.qty, a.custcode AS custcode, a.custname AS custname, c.subname_ch AS car FROM t_wms_inbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041'
WHERE 1=1
AND a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.useyn = 'N'
AND a.source = 'INCOMING'
), total_info AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a3.sdate || '_' || a3.factory || '_' || a3.storage || '_' || a3.itemcode || '_' || a3.invoiceno) AS total_count, NVL(SUM(a3.qty), 0) AS total_qty FROM t_wms_inbound a3 LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b3 ON a3.itemcode = b3.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c3 ON b3.carno = c3.subcode AND c3.typecode = 'MI041'
WHERE 1=1
AND a3.useyn = 'Y'
AND a3.useyn = 'N'
AND a3.source = 'INCOMING'
) SELECT bd.intf_yn AS INTF_YN, bd.sdate AS SDATE, CASE WHEN bd.custcode = '0039' THEN 'FREE' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS TYPE, bd.factory AS FACTORY, bd.storage AS STORAGE, bd.custcode AS CUSTCODE, bd.custname AS CUSTNAME, bd.car AS CAR, bd.itemcode AS ITEMCODE, bd.oitemcode AS OITEMCODE, bd.itemname AS ITEMNAME, SUM(bd.qty) AS QTY, MAX(ti.total_count) AS TOTALCOUNT, MAX(ti.total_qty) AS TOTALQTY FROM base_data bd CROSS JOIN total_info ti WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(bd.custcode) = '0039'
AND UPPER(bd.custcode) != '0039'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(bd.intf_yn, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(REPLACE(#{searchParams.inboundCondition}, ' ', '')) || '%'
GROUP BY bd.intf_yn, bd.sdate, CASE WHEN bd.custcode = '0039' THEN 'FREE' ELSE 'NORMAL' END, bd.factory, bd.storage, bd.custcode, bd.custname, bd.car, bd.itemcode, bd.oitemcode, bd.itemname ORDER BY bd.sdate DESC, bd.itemcode
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT a.factory AS FACTORY, a.storage AS STORAGE, a.scantype AS SCANTYPE, a.sdate AS SDATE, c.subname_ch AS CAR, a.itemcode AS ITEMCODE, b.itemname AS ITEMNAME, a.qty AS QTY, a.type AS TYPE, a.barcode AS BARCODE, a.location AS LOCATION, a.lotdate AS LOTDATE, a.ymdhms AS YMDHMS, a.loginid AS LOGINID, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) AS HHMM, a.factory || '-' || a.storage AS factory_storage, a.bqty as bqty, /* 전체 건수 */ COUNT(*) OVER () AS TOTALCOUNT, /* QTY 합 */ SUM(NVL(a.qty, 0)) OVER () AS TOTALQTY
FROM t_wms_realstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.spec and b.deldate = ' ' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC, a.itemcode
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_WMS_REALSTOCK( SDATE, ITEMCODE, QTY, YMDHMS, LOGINID, FACTORY, STORAGE, BQTY ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid}, #{factory}, #{workshop}, #{bqty} )
mapper.select:
SELECT CASE WHEN s.barcode IS NULL THEN '' ELSE a.factory END AS factory, CASE WHEN s.barcode IS NULL THEN '' ELSE a.storage END AS storage, a.wccode AS wccode, REGEXP_SUBSTR(a.wccode, '[0-9]+-[0-9]+-[0-9]+$') AS location, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE( NVL(s.ymdhms, a.ymdhms), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS' ), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) AS indate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode AS itemcode, b.itemname AS itemname, a.qty AS qty, a.barcode AS barcode, a.source AS source, SUM(a.qty) OVER () AS totalqty FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT barcode, ymdhms FROM ( SELECT s.barcode, s.ymdhms, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY s.barcode ORDER BY s.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_workmove s WHERE s.source = 'WIPSENDING' AND s.useyn = 'Y' ) WHERE rn = 1 ) s ON s.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode and b.deldate = ' ' LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.source = 'WIPINPUT' AND a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.YMDHMS, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sentdate, A.FACTORY AS sentfactory, A.STORAGE AS sentstorage, A.WCCODE AS wccode, A.BARCODE AS barcode, A.ITEMCODE AS itemcode, A.LOGINID AS loginid, A.YMDHMS AS ymdhms, B.ITEMNAME AS itemname, C.SUBNAME_CH AS car,
TO_NUMBER(A.QTY) AS qty,
NVL(I.scanqty, 0) AS scanqty, TO_NUMBER(A.QTY) - NVL(I.scanqty, 0) AS remainqty
FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE A LEFT JOIN ( /* ✅ 팔레트로 보냈는데, 파트로 스캔한 경우까지 팔레트 기준으로 합산 */ SELECT X.PBARCODE AS BARCODE, SUM(X.QTY) AS scanqty FROM ( /* 1) 파트로 스캔(WIPINPUT) → 팔레트 매핑되면 PBARCODE로 치환 */ SELECT COALESCE(P.PBARCODE, W.BARCODE) AS PBARCODE, TO_NUMBER(W.QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE W LEFT JOIN T_SCM_PALLET P ON P.BBARCODE = W.BARCODE WHERE W.SOURCE = 'WIPINPUT' AND W.USEYN = 'Y'
UNION ALL
/* 2) 팔레트로 스캔(WIPINPUT)한 건은 그대로 */ SELECT W.BARCODE AS PBARCODE, TO_NUMBER(W.QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE W WHERE W.SOURCE = 'WIPINPUT' AND W.USEYN = 'Y' ) X GROUP BY X.PBARCODE ) I ON I.BARCODE = A.BARCODE
LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE and b.deldate = ' ' LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041'
WHERE A.SOURCE = 'WIPSENDING' AND A.USEYN = 'Y'
AND NVL(I.scanqty, 0) < TO_NUMBER(A.QTY)
ORDER BY A.YMDHMS
SELECT * FROM T_WMS_CONSIGNEE WHERE USEYN = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_WMS_CONSIGNEE ( CONSIGNEE, CINFO1, CINFO2, CINFO3, CINFO4, CINFO5,
DINFO1, DINFO2, DINFO3, DINFO4, DINFO5 ) VALUES( #{consignee}, #{cinfo1}, #{cinfo2}, #{cinfo3}, #{cinfo4}, #{cinfo5},
#{dinfo1}, #{dinfo2}, #{dinfo3}, #{dinfo4}, #{dinfo5} )

when.test: excel == null or excel == '' or excel == 'N'

choose.otherwise:
SELECT Z.*, COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalCount FROM ( SELECT FACTORY , STORAGE , CAR , ITEMCODE , ITEMNAME , SPEC , SUM(QTY) AS QTY FROM ( SELECT a.FACTORY , a.STORAGE , C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR , a.ITEMCODE , B.ITEMNAME , b.SPEC AS SPEC , a.YYYYMM , SUM(a.QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_LOCATION a LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM b ON b.ITEMCODE = a.ITEMCODE and b.deldate = ' ' LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USEYN = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.FACTORY , a.STORAGE , C.SUBNAME_CH , a.ITEMCODE , B.ITEMNAME , b.SPEC , a.YYYYMM ) GROUP BY FACTORY , STORAGE , CAR , ITEMCODE , ITEMNAME , SPEC ) Z

mapper.select:
SELECT A.SDATE, A.CARTBARCODE, A.ASSYBARCODE, A.ASSYQTY, B.ITEMCODE, A.OITEMCODE, A.SOURCE, COUNT(DISTINCT A.CARTBARCODE) OVER () AS TOTALCARTQTY, SUM(A.ASSYQTY) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_VALIDATION A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.SPEC = A.OITEMCODE and b.deldate = ' ' WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.CARTBARCODE, A.ASSYBARCODE
select itemcode from t_mi_item where spec = #{oitemcode} and deldate = ' '
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_inspection ( sdate, itemcode, barcode, qty, okqty, ngqty, judgment, factory, storage, loginid, source, source2, ymdhms, barcode2) values ( #{date}, #{itemcode}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{qty}, #{qty}, #{source2}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{loginid}, #{source}, #{source2}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{barcode} )

insert into t_scm_barcode (barcode,kind,madate,sdate,itemcode,itemname,qty,totalqty,ymdhms,useyn,custname,labeltype,LASTSTATUS,LASTQTY, oitemcode, LASTFACTORY, FACTORY) values(#{barcode},'WMS', #{date}, #{date}, #{itemcode}, #{itemname}, #{qty}, #{qty},TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'Y','WOOBOTECH', 'PDA',#{laststatus}, #{qty}, #{oitemcode},'WBTA', 'WBTA')
mapper.select: SELECT barcode FROM t_scm_barcode WHERE barcode LIKE #{datePrefix} || '_' || #{oitemcode} || '_%' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(barcode, '[^_]+$')) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_wms_outbound ( sdate, barcode, ymdhms, loginid, itemcode, seq, qty, source, storage, factory, CUSTCODE, CUSTNAME, OITEMCODE ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid}, #{itemcode}, #{seq}, #{qty}, 'LOADRETURN', #{storage}, #{factory}, (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} ORDER BY CONDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ),
(SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE CU_CODE = (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} ORDER BY CONDATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1)), #{oitemcode} )

insert into t_wms_location ( sdate, ymdhms, location, barcode, itemcode, qty, loginid, factory, storage, RACK, source) values( #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{location}, #{barcode}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, #{loginid}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{rack}, #{source} )

insert into t_wms_conditionchange (sdate, itemcode, factory, storage, qty, barcode, oldokyn, newokyn, ymdhms, loginid, source, source2) values (#{date}, #{itemcode}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{qty}, #{barcode},#{oldokyn}, #{newokyn},TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),#{loginid}, #{source}, #{source2})
mapper.update: update t_wms_location set useyn = 'N', memo_d = #{dmemo}, ymdhms_d=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'
